name: loudnorm_two_pass
description: EBU R128 two-pass loudnorm. Pass 1 runs the analysis filter and emits measured_I / measured_TP / measured_LRA / measured_thresh / offset to stderr as JSON; pass 2 feeds those values back into a second loudnorm invocation as `measured_*` parameters for an exact, deterministic loudness target. Distinct from generic two-pass video encoding — it needs an inter-pass shuttle that captures stderr-side filter metadata and threads it into the next graph.
blockers: loudnorm-two-pass-shuttle (§3.1 step 7 / §2.4 'Two-pass loudnorm' row — pass 1 stderr → pass 2 params is not yet a pipeline orchestration primitive)
